title: SJ Heart Indicator
description: A mod that shows the player health above them.
body:
**SJ Heart Indicator** is a clean and lightweight Minecraft mod that displays player health directly above their character. Instead of guessing during fights, you can instantly see how much health a player has left — shown clearly as numeric hearts (e.g., 20).

This mod is perfect for PvP, multiplayer servers, or anyone who wants better combat awareness without adding heavy UI elements.

# Features
- Shows player health above their head (example: 20)
- Lightweight and performance-friendly
- Customizable keybind to toggle the indicator ON/OFF anytime
- Adjustable overlay position
Press Arrow UP to move the heart indicator higher
Press Arrow DOWN to move it lower
- Minimal and compact design that blends naturally with gameplay
- Why Use It?
**SJ Heart Indicator** keeps things simple — no unnecessary features and no performance impact. It provides a clean and practical way to track player health in real time, helping you make smarter decisions during combat.
